title: My Singing Mobs
body:
# Singing Monsters in Minecraft!
![Wubbox](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3056dda5809ff763776daa195b5d4cdecb6028ae.png)

Explore the world and find Singing Monsters!

While walking around the world you can meet two singing monsters - PomPom and Furcorn. If tamed, PomPom will give positive effects and remove negative ones, and Furcorn will fight.

![PomPom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98c1393698c510160584732935e03be385e2fb99.png)
![Furcorn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc54ad4cd288c21a7154376715d0e9fba54a2bd4.png)

Be careful with Wubbox, if you hit him a boss fight will start. During battle, Wubbox can summon minions - Wublites. There are 3 types of Wublites, one of them is normal, the second is fast but weak, and the third is slow and strong. When you defeat Wubbox you can get his core and use it to craft armor and a sword. And if you already have armor and a sword, you can craft a potion or a music disk.

![Wublite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2b4e313451f0750c394d4fad29a82605b1b277f.png)

## Features:
- Mobs: Wubbox, Wublite, PomPom, Furcorn, T-rox, Noggin, Maw
- Monstrous Sword and Armor
- Electricity Potion
- Electro Gun
- New Structures
- Advancements
